sections.name: Officium
lines: Septima die infra Octavam Ss. Apostolorum Petri et Pauli

sections.name: Comment
lines: In Divino Afflatu, when Pretiossisimi Sanguinis is transferred (to Monday the 4th), in case of SSmi Cordis (e.g. 2011), the proper last gospel from the Octave of the Apostels is said on this day.

sections.name: Evangelium
sections.condition: rubrica divino et feria 3 et tempore Octava SSmi Cordis
